hero.headline: Get your team in sync — instantly
hero.subheadline: TaskFlow helps distributed teams manage projects, track progress, and hit deadlines without the chaos of endless email threads.

features.sectionSubtitle: Simple, powerful, and built for collaboration.

card1.title: Real-time collaboration
card1.description: See changes as they happen. No refreshing, no conflicts — just seamless teamwork across time zones.

card2.title: Smart deadlines
card2.description: Automatic reminders and workload balancing keep your projects on track without micromanagement.

card3.title: Integrations you already use
card3.description: Connect with Slack, GitHub, Figma, and 50+ other tools your team relies on every day.

footer.tagline: Built for teams that move fast.
